summary: Applied ADR 0304 by replaying Step-CA from the latest realistic live baseline commit e28f1e51729a23c5a3d9b384ec285571a50cfa58 (repo version 0.177.142 / platform version 0.130.90), then rebasing onto origin/main head 9c58e76c652b9d5e65504d44412aad454207bcb8 (repo version 0.177.147 / platform version 0.130.92) after the exact-main portal integration releases, replaying OpenBao and Windmill, refreshing Atlas snapshots, re-verifying both repo-side and seeded Windmill drift detection clean across the 20 cataloged PostgreSQL databases, re-running the governed validation automation lanes, and cutting the integrated main release surfaces for repo version 0.177.148.

verification.observed: make converge-step-ca env=production succeeded from commit e28f1e51729a23c5a3d9b384ec285571a50cfa58 with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=124 changed=1 failed=0 and proxmox_florin : ok=54 changed=4 failed=0.

make converge-openbao env=production succeeded after rebasing to the current origin/main release baseline with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=381 changed=8 failed=0 and postgres-lv3 : ok=75 changed=1 failed=0.

make converge-windmill env=production finished cleanly after rebasing to the current origin/main release baseline with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=363 changed=48 failed=0, postgres-lv3 : ok=92 changed=1 failed=0, and proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 failed=0.

make atlas-refresh-snapshots, make atlas-validate, make atlas-lint, and make atlas-drift-check all completed successfully after the latest-main replay, with drift_count 0 across the 20 cataloged PostgreSQL databases and no emitted NATS or ntfy notifications.
scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py against f/lv3/atlas_drift_check returned returncode 0 with report.status clean, drift_count 0, and no published notifications.

The final release-cut regression slice re-passed covering linux_guest_firewall, postgres_vm, windmill_runtime, OpenBao runtime helpers, validation-gate contracts, and compose-runtime secret injection behavior.

The release-cut tree validated cleanly after rebasing onto origin/main 9c58e76c652b9d5e65504d44412aad454207bcb8: validation-runner contracts passed, generated-docs passed after regenerating the ADR index, canonical truth, status docs, the platform manifest, and the shared architecture-diagram bundle, agent-standards passed, and git diff --check reported no whitespace or conflict-marker defects before the mainline push.

The 2026-04-03 controller-local fallback rerun against the rebased tree captured the current governed remote-validation state while the final clean rerun and pre-push-gate replay were still pending before merge-to-main.

notes: This receipt supersedes receipts/live-applies/2026-04-01-adr-0304-atlas-mainline-live-apply.json as the authoritative mainline proof for ADR 0304.

The exact-main portal integration releases landed on origin/main while this live apply was in flight. Those releases changed shared release, docs, and canonical-truth surfaces but did not change the Atlas, OpenBao, or Windmill live-apply automation path, so the Step-CA replay from e28f1e51729a23c5a3d9b384ec285571a50cfa58 and the later OpenBao, Windmill, Atlas, and release-cut validation replays from the rebased tree form the authoritative combined verification set.

This closeout keeps the first verified live-apply platform truth for ADR 0304 at 0.130.90 while promoting the database_schema receipt and the final repository truth into release 0.177.148 on top of the current mainline platform version 0.130.92.
